summary: Verified PaymentModal props fix in ReportsSection.jsx. The bug fix is CORRECT - props now correctly named: onPaymentSuccess, featureType, price. Report type selection dialog shows correct prices ($29.00 AUD, $39.00 AUD). Payment modal cannot be fully tested as it requires documents to be uploaded first.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent

passed_tests: Generate Report button opens report type selection dialog
Report type selection dialog shows correct prices: Quick Summary ($29.00 AUD), Full Detailed Report ($29.00 AUD), Extensive Log Report ($39.00 AUD)
ReportsSection.jsx PaymentModal props are correctly named: onPaymentSuccess, featureType, price
Document validation works - toast shows 'Please upload documents before generating a report' when no documents

The price ($29.00/$39.00) is displayed correctly in the report type selection dialog
Payment modal requires documents to be uploaded first before opening - this is expected behavior
